scripts.build-app: tauri build --bundles app && mkdir -p builds && find src-tauri/target/release/bundle -maxdepth 3 -type d -name '*.app' -exec cp -R {} builds/ \;
scripts.build-dmg: npm run build-app && hdiutil create -volname "Claude Orchestrator" -srcfolder "builds/Claude Orchestrator.app" -ov -format UDZO "builds/Claude Orchestrator.dmg"
